parts.text: Based on this anime character, generate a photorealistic photo of the same girl having a picnic in a beautiful park. She is sitting on a picnic blanket on green grass, looking at the camera with a sweet smile. Keep her silver-white long wavy hair, bright blue eyes, and youthful 23-year-old Japanese face. She is wearing a casual white sundress. Surrounded by picnic food, flowers, and trees. Sunny day, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, shot on iPhone.
